# discord_channel (Resource)

Manages a Discord channel within a server.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `name` (String) The name of the channel (1-100 characters).
- `server_id` (String) The ID of the server (guild) the channel belongs to.

### Optional

- `bitrate` (Number) The bitrate (in bits) of the voice channel (voice only).
- `nsfw` (Boolean) Whether the channel is NSFW.
- `parent_id` (String) ID of the parent category for the channel.
- `position` (Number) The position of the channel in the left-hand listing.
- `rate_limit_per_user` (Number) Amount of seconds a user has to wait before sending another message (0-21600).
- `topic` (String) The topic of the channel (0-1024 characters).
- `type` (Number) The type of channel (0 = GUILD_TEXT, 2 = GUILD_VOICE, 4 = GUILD_CATEGORY, etc.).
- `user_limit` (Number) The user limit of the voice channel (voice only, 0 for unlimited).

### Read-Only

- `id` (String) The ID of the channel.
- `last_updated` (String)
